title: E3: Multi-Worker Collaboration
definition_of_done: All four sub-stories implemented and tested: push/sync, audit log, worker presence, issue assignment. Atomic release. All tests pass and binary builds.
outcome: All four sub-stories implemented: push/sync (LowStakesPushThreshold, Push/FetchAndRebase on git.Client, Pusher interface, FilePushTracker, wire push deps), audit log (audit.Load, trls log command), worker presence (trls workers command), issue assignment (OpAssign, AssignedWorker materialization, trls assign/unassign, assignment-aware ComputeReady). All tests pass, binary builds.
